description: This file defines the service layer for managing loan application drafts in a Spring Boot application, including CRUD operations with JSON handling and optimistic locking.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraftService
classes.description: Service class providing business logic for creating, retrieving, updating, patching, and deleting loan draft entities.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new loan draft for a user, initializing with provided data and section status.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves a specific loan draft owned by a user.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Lists all loan drafts for a user, ordered by most recent update.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Performs a full update (replace) of a loan draft, with version checking for concurrency control.

methods.name: patchSection
methods.description: Partially updates a specific section within a loan draft by merging JSON data for a section.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes a specified loan draft owned by a user.
